name: Rhythm Soccer
short_description: Play with football teams from Brazil, Argentina, Italy, and Germany in an amazing rhythm game! Hit the notes to pass and shoot and win the tournament! With cartoonish visuals and 15 manually synchronized songs, have a lot of fun! Download now and experience the excitement of the rhythm of football!
detailed_description: Step into the world of rhythm football and play with your favorite teams from Brazil, Argentina, Italy, and Germany! This amazing rhythm game is all about timing - hit the notes perfectly to pass the ball and score a goal. The cartoonish visuals add a fun twist to the gameplay, and the 15 manually synchronized songs will keep you entertained for hours. You can play friendly matches or compete in a tournament to become the ultimate rhythm football champion. This game was made with a lot of love by a solo developer and is now available on Steam. Download now and experience the excitement of rhythm football!
